description:
Add a compass rose / north arrow to the globe UI that rotates to reflect the camera's current heading.

- Render as a small SVG north indicator positioned bottom-right, consistent with Google Maps aesthetic (white card, subtle shadow)
- Rotate the indicator using Cesium camera.heading on each preRender tick
- Since tilt is disabled (orbit-only), only heading (rotation) matters
- Clicking the compass should reset heading to north (heading = 0)
title: Add compass / north arrow indicator
